recommendations.title: The Last Sharknado: It's About Time
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Our hero Fin has battled sharks all over the globe, but in this last installment he will tackle the final shark-tier - time travel.

recommendations.title: Sharknado 3: Oh Hell No!
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: The sharks take bite out of the East Coast when the sharknado hits Washington, D.C. and Orlando, Florida.

recommendations.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
recommendations.overview: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

recommendations.title: Sharknado 4: The 4th Awakens
recommendations.overview: The new installment of the Sharknado franchise takes place 5 years after Sharknado 3: Oh Hell No! There have been no Sharknados in the intervening years, but now they’re appearing again in unexpected ways.

recommendations.title: Hansel & Gretel
recommendations.overview: In this modern retelling of the classic horror tale, teen siblings are enslaved by a psychotic recluse within her gruesome house of horrors in the woods.

recommendations.title: Sharknado
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie

recommendations.title: Boo

recommendations.title: I Am Legend
recommendations.overview: Robert Neville is a scientist who was unable to stop the spread of the terrible virus that was incurable and man-made. Immune, Neville is now the last human survivor in what is left of New York City and perhaps the world. For three years, Neville has

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb team up with the Avengers to save the world from Dr. Doofenshmirtz and a group of dangerous supervillains.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb The Movie: Across the 2nd Dimension
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Adventure, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb get trapped in an alternate dimension where the evil Doofenshmirtz rules the tri-state area. They must find a way back home with the help of their pet platypus named Perry, who they discover is a secret agent.
